description: Cross-language TUI parity constants. All language implementations MUST load values from here.

status.description: Prefix symbols for status lines. Mirrors Go's InfoType constants in tui/status.go.

spinner.description: Braille dot spinner frames and timing.

help.description: Root --help layout contract. Fang is canonical; TS and Python mirror it.

verbosity.description: Stackable -V flag maps count to log level. --quiet overrides to warn.

streams.description: Per-command named output streams toggled via --stream flag.

table.description: Styled-table contract for the output package. Plain tabwriter is the default; callers opt in to the lipgloss-backed renderer via WithTableStyle. The styled path is gated on writer-is-TTY so non-TTY writers (pipes, files, tests) always emit ANSI-free, diff-friendly output.
